items.reviewerNotes: Approve q0449: source asks penalty points for using falsified/altered license plates. Source option D is 12 points; q0981 is about a forged/altered transit permit/driver document and is not the right qid.
Exact q0779 image/prompt for yellow filled road marking, but the Russian options/source key conflict with the canonical answer wording. Marked UNKNOWN so the local answer key can be manually QCed.
Exact image is q0820: expressway Y-shaped/directional branching sign. Source option D maps to Y-shaped road ahead; matcher top q0700 is the ring-intersection sign and is wrong.
Exact yellow broken/solid centerline image. Source prompt mentions dashed line, but the image and options indicate the solid-side crossing prohibition; source option A maps to canonical q0725.

Best existing match for cut-in/yield behavior. Source says another vehicle cuts into the lane; q0105 says non-motorized vehicles cutting in, but the required safe action is the same and options are compatible.
Exact passing-bay sign q0879. Source extracted key C/parking space conflicts with the sign; source option D is the passing bay/yielding place meaning.
Exact q0742 fixed-direction parking marking image. Source option C maps to fixed/directional parking; matcher top q0720 is a bus-lane sign and is wrong.
